triage_rows.direction: keep_the_current_topmost supervision configuration when the supervision-contract change signal remains stable
reconfigure_the_next supervising cycle when supervisor_mode_change, supervision_loop_mode_change, or contract_action_change flips state
update_topmost sleep and backoff behavior immediately when sleep_strategy_change or backoff_mode_change flips state

interpretation: This is the topmost change detector for the runtime-stack supervision contract.
A supervising process can watch it to know when actual topmost supervision behavior changed without rereading the full contract every cycle.
